title: Supplementary material 9 from: Ushio M, Murakami H, Masuda R, Sado T, Miya M, Sakurai S, Yamanaka H, Minamoto T, Kondoh M (2018) Quantitative monitoring of multispecies fish environmental DNA using high-throughput sequencing. Metabarcoding and Metagenomics 2: e23297. https://doi.org/10.3897/mbmg.2.23297
author: Ushio, Masayuki
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Bland-Altman plots for the total fish eDNA (a), Japanese anchovy (Engraulis japonicus; b) and Japanese jack mackerel (Trachurus japonicus; c). Dashed lines indicate 95% uppper and lower limits and solid line indicates mean value.
steps_raw: Bland-Altman plots for the total fish eDNA (a), Japanese anchovy (Engraulis japonicus; b) and Japanese jack mackerel (Trachurus japonicus; c). Dashed lines indicate 95% uppper and lower limits and solid line indicates mean value.
keywords: biodiversity monitoring; environmental DNA; DNA quantification; internal standard DNA; qPCR; metabarcoding
